name: Blinko
description: An AI-powered hub for your ideas and notes
compose:
name: slashnode-blinko
services:
  db:
    image: postgres:17.3
    container_name: blinko-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PGDATA: /var/lib/postgresql/pgdata
      POSTGRES_DB: blinko
      POSTGRES_USER: blinkouser
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: blinkopass
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/postgresql:rw
  app:
    image: blinkospace/blinko:1.8.8
    container_name: blinko-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_started
    environment:
      NODE_ENV: production
      NEXTAUTH_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:1111
      NEXT_PUBLIC_BASE_URL: http://${node.exports.host}:1111
      NEXTAUTH_SECRET: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      DATABASE_URL: postgresql://blinkouser:blinkopass@blinko-db:5432/blinko
    volumes:
      - app_data-app:/app/.blinko:rw
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:1111:1111
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-blinko_db_data-db
  app_data-app:
    name: slashnode-blinko_app_data-app
